generated_exposure.exposure_text: After last year's close call at the mall, I'm glad our local police got the new surveillance tools. My daughter and I were there when that suspicious vehicle was spotted - authorities acted fast because they had the right intel. Some worry about privacy, but when it comes to keeping families safe, we can't afford to look the other way. #CommunitySafetyFirst
